description:
Configure the branding for PDF invoices and packing slips by uploading the logo from /home/ga/Documents/nestwell_logo.png for both PDF and HTML print-outs. Set the address to:
NestWell Home Fulfillment
123 Commerce Dr
Los Angeles, CA 90001
Once configured, generate an invoice for the most recent pending order.

metadata.expected_address:
NestWell Home Fulfillment
123 Commerce Dr
Los Angeles, CA 90001
